seo.title: Compress PDF - Free online PDF size reducer
seo.description: Try to optimize PDF structure and reduce file size in your browser. Results depend on PDF content, images, and internal structure.

lead: Try safe PDF structure optimization in your browser, then review readability and page count.

strings.heroLead: Useful before uploading a PDF that may be too large. Results depend on the original file, image content, and PDF structure.
strings.dropLead: Drop a PDF here, or choose a local file with the button.
strings.largeFileTip: Large scanned files may need more memory and may not become much smaller.
strings.optionsLead: The default mode performs structural optimization and does not promise a fixed compression ratio.
strings.resultLead: The size change will appear after the result is created.
